ddls:
CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "statefp20" TEXT /* State FIPS code */,
  "countyfp20" TEXT /* County FIPS code */,
  "countyns20" TEXT /* County National Standard code */,
  "geoid20" TEXT /* GeoID combining state and county FIPS codes */,
  "name20" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "namelsad20" TEXT /* Name with legal/statistical description */,
  "lsad20" TEXT /* Legal/statistical area description */,
  "classfp20" TEXT /* County classification code */,
  "mtfcc20" TEXT /* MAF/TIGER feature class code */,
  "csafp20" TEXT /* Combined Statistical Area FIPS code */,
  "cbsafp20" TEXT /* Core Based Statistical Area FIPS code */,
  "metdivfp20" TEXT /* Metropolitan Division FIPS code */,
  "funcstat20" TEXT /* Functional status code */,
  "aland20" INTEGER /* Land area in square meters */,
  "awater20" INTEGER /* Water area in square meters */,
  "intptlat20" TEXT /* Internal point latitude */,
  "intptlon20" TEXT /* Internal point longitude */,
  "geometry" TEXT /* Geometry of the county (WKT format) */,
  "boundary_date" TEXT /* Date when the county boundary was last updated */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Estimated population of the county */,
  "density" REAL /* Population density of the county */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_counties_lsad20 FOREIGN KEY ("lsad20") REFERENCES legal_statistical_areas ("lsad20"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_counties_classfp20 FOREIGN KEY ("classfp20") REFERENCES classifications ("classfp20"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_counties_statefp20 FOREIGN KEY ("statefp20") REFERENCES states ("statefp20"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_counties_funcstat20 FOREIGN KEY ("funcstat20") REFERENCES functional_statuses ("funcstat20"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_counties_cbsafp20 FOREIGN KEY ("cbsafp20") REFERENCES core_based_statistical_areas ("cbsafp20"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_counties_metdivfp20 FOREIGN KEY ("metdivfp20") REFERENCES metropolitan_divisions ("metdivfp20"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_counties_csafp20 FOREIGN KEY ("csafp20") REFERENCES combined_statistical_areas ("csafp20"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_counties_mtfcc20 FOREIGN KEY ("mtfcc20") REFERENCES mtfcc_codes ("mtfcc20")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "statefp20" TEXT /* State FIPS code */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* State abbreviation */,
  "state_capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the state */,
  "state_population" INTEGER /* Estimated population of the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "classifications" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each classification */,
  "classfp20" TEXT /* County classification code */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the classification */,
  "classification_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the classification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "functional_statuses" (
  "func_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each functional status */,
  "funcstat20" TEXT /* Functional status code */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the functional status */,
  "status_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the functional status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("func_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "legal_statistical_areas" (
  "lsad_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each legal/statistical area */,
  "lsad20" TEXT /* Legal/statistical area code */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the legal/statistical area */,
  "lsa_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the legal/statistical area */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lsad_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mtfcc_codes" (
  "mtfcc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each MAF/TIGER feature class code */,
  "mtfcc20" TEXT /* MAF/TIGER feature class code */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the MAF/TIGER feature class code */,
  "mtfcc_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the MAF/TIGER feature class code */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mtfcc_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "combined_statistical_areas" (
  "csa_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each combined statistical area */,
  "csafp20" TEXT /* Combined Statistical Area FIPS code */,
  "csa_name" TEXT /* Name of the combined statistical area */,
  "csa_population" INTEGER /* Estimated population of the combined statistical area */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("csa_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "core_based_statistical_areas" (
  "cbsa_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each core based statistical area */,
  "cbsafp20" TEXT /* Core Based Statistical Area FIPS code */,
  "cbsa_name" TEXT /* Name of the core based statistical area */,
  "cbsa_population" INTEGER /* Estimated population of the core based statistical area */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cbsa_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metropolitan_divisions" (
  "metdiv_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metropolitan division */,
  "metdivfp20" TEXT /* Metropolitan Division FIPS code */,
  "metdiv_name" TEXT /* Name of the metropolitan division */,
  "metdiv_population" INTEGER /* Estimated population of the metropolitan division */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metdiv_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data analyst, admin, researcher) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Encrypted password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the county data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the county data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_method" TEXT /* Method used to access the county data (e.g., API, web interface) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "county_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version of the county data */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date of the version */,
  "version_data" TEXT /* JSON data representing the county data at this version */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the version */,
  "version_author" TEXT /* User who made changes to the county data */,
  "version_comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes about the changes made to the county data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_county_versions_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)
